title: GluonTS Probabilistic Planning
summary: Turn probabilistic forecasting into a planning UI with uncertainty-aware allocations, error bands, and scenario notes for operators.
knowledge_base: GluonTS Probabilistic Planning is positioned as a Probabilistic Forecasting starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Turn probabilistic forecasting into a planning UI with uncertainty-aware allocations, error bands, and scenario notes for operators.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on gluonts, forecasting, probabilistic, planning.
Source paper: GluonTS: Probabilistic and Neural Time Series Modeling in Python

Production differentiation focus: Turn upstream probabilistic forecasting capabilities into a production-style application with operations-facing workflows.; Add deployment packaging, monitoring hooks, and screenshot-ready demos instead of notebook-only output.; Connect model behavior to concrete business decisions so the project is easier to evaluate and present.
paper_title: GluonTS: Probabilistic and Neural Time Series Modeling in Python
why_high_score: Official or primary upstream repo with 5167 GitHub stars.
